coreCompetencies: Understanding of the difference between collaborative filtering and content-based recommendation
Ability to load and explore user-item interaction matrices with pandas
Supervised implementation of popularity and cosine-similarity recommenders
Computation of precision, recall and coverage on a held-out test set
Preparation of ratings data with a temporal train-test split
Use of libraries such as scikit-learn and Surprise for baseline models
Documentation of recommendation experiments in reproducible notebooks
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with SQL to extract interaction events from a database
Notions of linear algebra applied to user and item vectors
Use of Git to version notebooks and experimentation scripts
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Completes guided preprocessing and baseline evaluation tasks
Needs 3-6 months to become productive

coreCompetencies: Implementation of user-based and item-based collaborative filtering with nearest neighbors
Building matrix factorization models with stochastic gradient descent
Handling cold start for new users and items through content signals
Applying regularization and cross-validation to control overfitting
Computing similarities with cosine, Pearson correlation and Euclidean distance
Preprocessing implicit feedback: weighting clicks, views and dwell time
Writing unit tests for scoring and retrieval functions
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of hybrid recommenders combining content and interaction
Use of SciPy sparse matrices to represent large-scale interactions
Familiarity with building a batch recommendation service
indicators: Builds complete recommendation models with occasional supervision
Resolves medium-complexity issues in data pipelines
Actively participates in code and experiment reviews

coreCompetencies: Design of end-to-end recommender systems from ingestion to serving

Instrumentation of impression and click logging for future training sets
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of recurrent networks and transformers for sequential recommendation
Implementation of multi-armed bandits to balance exploration and exploitation
Technical mentoring of entry-level engineers
indicators: Completes complex recommendation features with minimal supervision
Identifies and fixes failures in training and serving pipelines
Actively contributes to the technical design of recommender systems

coreCompetencies: Architecture of two-stage recommenders: candidate generation and reranking

Use of language models to enrich item representations

indicators: Leads development of critical recommendation components
